name: pernav-bridge
description: Local bridge: your own AI account (Claude subscription/API key; CLI subscriptions: Codex CLI/ChatGPT, Gemini CLI, Qwen Code, Copilot CLI; or any OpenAI-compatible provider: OpenAI, Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, GLM, MiniMax, Mistral, Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama) <-> browser extension over WebSocket.
